programs.title: G20
programs.desc: During the G20 summit, the leaders of the world's influential countries become the targets of terrorists.US President Danielle Sutton (Viola Davis) miraculously manages to escape the attackers.She must face the enemy alone.

actor: Prime Minister Oliver Everett - Douglas Hodge
Treasury Secretary Joanna Worth - Elizabeth Marvel

programs.title: Laws of Man
programs.desc: A suspenseful story set in the paranoid climate of the Cold War era.The year is 1963. Two federal marshals are investigating a case in rural Nevada.They are on the trail of a sinister conspiracy.

programs.title: Blue Valentine
programs.desc: Dean grew up in a broken home.He never planned to build a lasting relationship until he met Cindy, with whom he fell in love at first sight.When, after a few weeks of dating, it turns out that the girl is expecting another man's child, she makes the difficult decision to get married.The couple tries to create a happy family, but over time they begin to face a serious crisis.The infatuation disappears, and everyday problems make it difficult for them to find understanding.Dean abuses alcohol and does simple physical work, unable to guarantee his wife real stability and support.The couple falls into conflicts more and more often.However, he still tries to rebuild his relationships for the sake of little Frankie.This perfectly portrayed study of the breakdown of a relationship was nominated for the Grand Jury Prize at the Sundance Film Festival.The role of Michelle Williams was nominated for an Oscar and a Golden Globe.

programs.title: It's a Wonderful Knife
programs.desc: A year ago, teenage Winnie Carruthers (Jane Widdop) had to face a psychopathic murderer, Henry Waters (Justin Long), on Christmas Eve, whose victim was also her best friend.Now it's Christmas again in the town of Angel Falls.Winnie still remembers the tragic events, although her father David (Joel McHale) and other loved ones advise her to leave the difficult past behind.A misunderstood girl on a bridge on Christmas night makes a wish - she would prefer to have never been born.He then finds himself in a nightmarish parallel universe.He discovers that without her, everything could have turned out much worse.No one recognizes her here, she is a stranger even to her family and friends.And what's worse, Henry is still alive and the mayor of Angel Falls.The teenager must regain her former life and face a bloodthirsty murderer.A bloody variation on the famous Christmas classic - "It's a Wonderful Life" by Frank Capra.

programs.title: Little Emma
programs.desc: A little girl named Emma was raised by animals.Her life is full of warmth and joy, until one of her friends discovers the unpleasant truth that she was actually adopted and is not part of their family.Devastated, Emma sets out on a journey to find her loved ones.Along the way, he gathers an extraordinary team, including the clumsy inventor Żółwik Bystrzak, the ambitious scientist Edward Wilk and the brave Weasel Sancho.Together they are looking for a mysterious island which, according to legend, is inhabited by tiny people.

programs.title: Book of Dragons
programs.desc: Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs and Gobber learn the secrets of the dragons contained in the book.Gobber tells the others the story of Borek the Unlucky, who was the first to describe these unusual creatures.
